Company Registration Services Across Uttar Pradesh

Uttar Pradesh is one of India's fastest-growing states for business formation — with Noida and Greater Noida emerging as major IT/ITeS and manufacturing hubs, Lucknow as the state capital driving government and services sector growth, Kanpur as a leather and textile manufacturing powerhouse, Agra and Mathura anchoring tourism and trade, and emerging industrial corridors along the Purvanchal Expressway, Yamuna Expressway, and Ganga Expressway. The ease of doing business reforms under the UP Invest programme have made company registration in Uttar Pradesh faster and more streamlined than ever before.

Taxvio handles end-to-end company formation across all 800+ UP cities — Private Limited Company, Limited Liability Partnership (LLP), One Person Company (OPC), and Section 8 non-profit company. Our MCA-registered CAs handle the complete incorporation process: name availability check on the RUN portal, DSC procurement and DIN application, SPICe+ form filing, MOA and AOA drafting, PAN and TAN application, and Certificate of Incorporation — typically within 7–10 working days for standard cases.

Annual ROC Compliance and Ongoing MCA Filings in UP

Every company and LLP registered in Uttar Pradesh has ongoing annual compliance obligations with the Registrar of Companies (RoC), Kanpur — the jurisdictional ROC for all UP companies. Private Limited Companies must file AOC-4 (financial statements) within 30 days of AGM and MGT-7 (annual return) within 60 days of AGM, with the AGM itself required within 6 months of financial year end (i.e., by September 30). LLPs must file Form 11 (annual return) by May 30 and Form 8 (statement of accounts) by October 30 every year.

Non-compliance with ROC annual filing deadlines attracts additional fees (₹100 per day per form), and persistent non-compliance leads to ACTIVE to INACTIVE status and director disqualification under Section 164(2). Taxvio's annual ROC compliance package for UP companies covers complete financial statement preparation, AOC-4 and MGT-7 filing, Board minutes and AGM/EGM documentation, secretarial certification, and filing fee management — ensuring your UP-registered company maintains ACTIVE status year after year.

Why UP Businesses Choose Taxvio for MCA / ROC Services

Uttar Pradesh businesses — whether a startup in Noida's Sector 62 IT park, a trading company in Kanpur's Kidwai Nagar, a manufacturing firm in Meerut's industrial area, or an NGO in Varanasi — all share the same RoC jurisdiction: Registrar of Companies, Kanpur, under the Ministry of Corporate Affairs. Taxvio's team has deep familiarity with the Kanpur RoC's processing timelines, common objection patterns for company name approvals, SPICe+ form requirements, and post-incorporation compliance triggers.

Our UP company formation clients benefit from our integrated service model: we don't just incorporate the company — we simultaneously handle GST registration, income tax PAN and TAN, MSME Udyam registration (for eligible businesses), and professional tax registration, ensuring the new entity is fully operational and compliant from Day 1. For ongoing clients, our annual ROC compliance calendar includes automated reminders, advance document collection, and timely filing — so UP company directors never miss a statutory due date or face the dreaded DIN disqualification notice.
